subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me turning towards Thee and clinging to the cord of Thy bounty. Ordain for me, through Thy generosity, that which Thou lovest and with which Thou art well-pleased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی مقبلاً الیک و متمسکاً بحبل عطائک قدر لی بجودک ما تحب و ترضی
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @justice and mercy, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
